class.name: SimulationManager
class.brief_description: Manages the 16-byte bitwise grid simulation, including scent propagation, the Branchless ALU, and the Pooled ECS.
class.description: The SimulationManager is the primary GDExtension bridge between Godot and the C++ simulation engine. It handles the lifetime of the grid memory, the execution of the "Smellnet" AI pathfinding, the Branchless ALU for complex elemental interactions, and a Pooled Structure of Arrays (SoA) for unit management and deterministic combat.

method.name: add_annihilation
method.description: Registers a mutual annihilation rule between two effect bits. If both bits are present on a tile during a simulation step, they will both be destroyed.

method.name: add_biome_transition
method.description: Defines how a specific biome reacts to a surviving effect bit. For example, Fire (effect) on Grass (biome) could result in Ash (new biome).

method.name: add_chemistry
method.description: Registers a chemical combination rule. If Bit A and Bit B are present, they are consumed to create the resulting effect stack (which can contain one or more bits).

method.name: auto_update_scent
method.description: Automatically calculates the smellnet BFS propagation using all active Player units (Team 0) as scent sources.

method.name: clear_interaction_tables
method.description: Wipes all annihilation, chemistry, and biome transition rules from the LUTs. Useful for re-loading definitions from JSON.

method.name: despawn_unit
method.description: Removes a unit from the simulation and returns its ID to the pool's free-list.

method.name: generate_new_world
method.description: Clears the grid and generates a new world state based on the provided seed.

method.name: get_all_units
method.description: Returns a dictionary of all active entity IDs and their current Vector2i grid positions.

method.name: get_grid_data
method.description: Returns the raw 1D array of 16-byte tiles as a PackedByteArray, suitable for passing to Vulkan Storage Buffers in Godot shaders.

method.name: get_scent
method.description: Returns the 4-bit scent value (0-15) for the specified coordinate.

method.name: get_scent_map_string
method.description: Returns an ASCII representation of the current scent grid for debugging purposes.

method.name: get_tile_composition
method.description: Returns the 8-bit composition (biome ID) of the specified tile.

method.name: get_tile_effects
method.description: Returns the current 64-bit effect stack for the specified tile.

method.name: get_unit_at
method.description: Returns the entity ID located at the specified grid coordinate, or -1 if empty.

method.name: get_unit_intent_pos
method.description: Returns the intended movement destination for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_pos
method.description: Returns the current grid position of the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_team
method.description: Returns the team ID for the specified unit (0=Ally, 1=Enemy).

method.name: get_unit_velocity
method.description: Returns the current velocity (movement speed) for the specified unit.

method.name: get_unit_weight
method.description: Returns the base weight (mass) for the specified unit.

method.name: is_impassable
method.description: Returns true if the tile is flagged as impassable for scent propagation and unit movement.

method.name: load_state_snapshot
method.description: Instantly restores the simulation state (Grid and Units) from the last saved snapshot.

method.name: move_unit_intent
method.description: Sets a unit's movement plan for the next turn execution.

method.name: process_ai_intents
method.description: Commands all active Enemy units to calculate movement intents based on the current smellnet scent trail.

method.name: run_scent_update
method.description: Executes the BFS scent propagation algorithm from a manual coordinate.

method.name: run_step
method.description: Executes one discrete simulation step, processing Movement, The Clash, Grid ALU, and Propagation.

method.name: save_state_snapshot
method.description: Captures a raw binary snapshot of the entire world state for later restoration.

method.name: set_flammable
method.description: Configures whether a specific biome ID is considered flammable for the propagation engine.

method.name: set_impassable
method.description: Sets or clears the impassable flag for the specified tile.

method.name: set_propagation_interval
method.description: Sets the simulation step interval for a specific effect bit (e.g., Fire spreads every 4 steps).

method.name: set_propagation_rule
method.description: Configures the propagation behavior for a specific effect bit.

method.name: set_tile_composition
method.description: Manually sets the composition (biome ID) for a specific tile.

method.name: set_tile_effect
method.description: Injects an effect bit into the specified tile's effect stack.

method.name: spawn_unit
method.description: Spawns a unit with default velocity into the grid.

method.name: spawn_unit_full
method.description: Spawns a unit with specific stats into the grid.

members.member: The vertical height of the grid in tiles.
The horizontal width of the grid in tiles.
